creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
new release of elm 2.4 ME+ pl 94.

	Makefile
		version bumped.
		MAINTAINER email address changed.
		PATCH_* and LIB_DEPENDS (iconv) added.
		INSTALLS_SHLIB and LDCONFIG_DIRS added.
		SCRIPTS_ENV and DOC_FILES updated.

	distinfo
		updated.

	pkg-plist
		shared libs and docs updated.

	files/elm.mimetypes
		updated.

	files/patch-ag (doc/Makefile.SH)
		deleted.

	files/patch-ah (doc/newalias.1)
		deleted.

	files/patch-newmbox.c
		updated.

	scripts/pre-configure
		-e added.
		PREFIX -> LOCALBASE for external programs.
		new iconv support added (untested).
		config.sh generation fixed.

How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
